questionHtml: Explain why the addition of small amounts of carbon to iron makes the metal harder.
markschemeHtml:
disrupts the regular arrangement «of iron atoms/ions»
OR
carbon different size «to iron atoms/ions» ✔

prevents layers/atoms sliding over each other ✔

meta.title: Explain why the addition of small amounts of carbon to iron makes the metal harder.

Structure 2.4.3—Alloys are mixtures of a metal and other metals or non-metals. They have enhanced properties. Explain the properties of alloys in terms of non-directional bonding.
